features.name: blackbox module with all inout ports
features.description: Code should include a module with attribute blackbox and all ports declared as inout
features.snippet:
attribute \blackbox 1
module \bb
    wire inout 3 \o
    wire inout 2 \b
    wire inout 1 \a
endmodule

features.name: inout port with known input driver
features.description: Code should include a wire connection where an inout port is used as input with a known driver, triggering multiple driver conflict

features.name: concatenation connected to inout port
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of signals connected to an inout port, where some bits have known drivers
